required_preferences.fact: Ceases all group fitness classes—including yoga—temporarily and practices only gentle, doctor-approved restorative stretches at home until cleared by her cardiologist

supersedes.fact: Avoids all high-impact exercise since her ankle injury — only chooses low-impact or restorative activities for now

required_preferences.fact: Suspends family day trips during school breaks, opting instead for at-home activities and virtual experiences due to medical restrictions on travel while the heart monitor is in use

supersedes.fact: Plans a day trip for the family every school break — never spends the whole break at home

required_preferences.fact: Tries a brand new vegetarian recipe with her son every weekend — never repeats the same dish in a given month
Never reads or responds to work emails after 8 pm — strictly silences notifications to preserve home time
Reserves Wednesday afternoons for preparatory work and reflection ahead of in-person initiative meetings, treating this as non-negotiable focus time
Dedicates one evening per week to developing a public outreach plan, separating this work from regular research and teaching duties

persona: A mid-career sociologist with multiple published journal articles
